action.reasoning: Observation: The TenCrop TTA ensemble of two ConvNeXt models reached 74.53% accuracy (new best). We have ~84 minutes and 22 iterations remaining. Analysis: Adding a third architecturally diverse model should improve the ensemble via error decorrelation. ResNet50 (CNN with residual connections, IMAGENET1K_V2 weights) is fundamentally different from ConvNeXt (hierarchical backbone with depthwise convs). Training it for 15 epochs with batch_size=256 should take ~35-45 minutes, leaving time for evaluation. Decision: 1) Update predict.py to optionally include checkpoints/resnet/best_resnet50.pt in the ensemble (gracefully falls back if missing). 2) Launch ResNet50 training for 15 epochs on raw noisy labels with strong augmentation/regularization. 3) Evaluate the three-model ensemble in the next iteration.
action.command: python train.py --model resnet50 --epochs 15 --batch_size 256 --lr 2e-3 --weight_decay 0.05 --label_smoothing 0.1 --mixup_alpha 0.2 --warmup_epochs 2 --num_workers 4 --checkpoint_dir checkpoints/resnet --data_dir /data --train_pt train.pt --val_pt val.pt
